data.title: Nobel closes first tranche of private placement offerings in Canada.
data.description: This news release is specifically for distribution within Canada and is not permitted for distribution to United States newswire services or for dissemination in the United States.

data.title: National DCP celebrates delivery of 750th store package for Dunkin', supporting 10,000 US restaurants. $3B supply chain company.
data.description: A $3 billion supply chain management firm, National DCP, LLC (NDCP), recently marked a significant milestone by providing support to 10,000 quick-service restaurants across the United States. Headquartered in Atlanta, the company specializes in serving Dunkin' franchisees. NDCP recently celebrated a noteworthy achievement with the successful delivery of supplies to their 750th restaurant.

data.title: DMI Solutions acquires proprietary technology from Leading Edge Innovations, expanding innovation capabilities. Wharton, N.J., Dec. 11, 2025.
data.description: DMI Solutions, based in Wharton, New Jersey, revealed on December 11, 2025, that they have successfully acquired the exclusive process and ingredient technology of Leading Edge Innovations. This strategic move aims to enhance DMI's innovation capacities significantly. The acquisition encompasses crucial assets such as intellectual property, specialized equipment, and more.

data.title: Zoovu introduces MCP Server for AI agents, to enhance agentic commerce for brands and retailers globally.
data.description: Zoovu has introduced the MCP Server in Boston to speed up Agentic eCommerce for worldwide brands and retailers.

data.title: Rivian to reveal autonomous driving plan on Thursday at 'Autonomy & AI Day'.
data.description: Rivian is set to unveil its autonomous driving platform roadmap on Thursday during its 'Autonomy & AI Day'. This event will offer insights into the company's plans for advancing in autonomous technology. Rivian's initiative to showcase their autonomous driving strategy holds great significance for investors and industry enthusiasts alike. The event is anticipated to reveal crucial details about Rivian's future direction in autonomous driving. Stay tuned for updates on the outcome of 'Autonomy & AI Day'.

data.title: Visa stock upgraded to buy by BofA for growth potential & stablecoin prospects. V stock ranks 20th in Dow.
data.description: On Thursday, Bank of America raised its recommendation for Visa stock to a buy, citing the company's potential for share growth and opportunities in the stablecoin market. Visa's stock is currently ranked 20th in the Dow. The upgrade comes amidst positive outlook for Visa's upside potential and stablecoin prospects.

data.title: GE Vernova stock surged 16% and named top pick for 2026 due to strong position in AI, according to Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: Shares of GE Vernova experienced a substantial 16% increase in value on Wednesday, and the company was subsequently designated as a "top pick" for the year 2026 on Thursday. Market analysts highlighted GE Vernova as being exceptionally well-positioned in the power sector for the forthcoming AI era. This recognition was mentioned in an article on Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Ciena stock jumps after fiscal Q4 earnings beat estimates; fiscal 2026 revenue guidance exceeds expectations.
data.description: Ciena's stock saw a significant increase following their fiscal Q4 earnings report, which exceeded expectations. Additionally, their revenue guidance for fiscal 2026 surpassed projections significantly. The surge in stock value came as a result of impressive data center order growth for the company.

data.title: Oracle's stock dropped after reporting mixed fiscal Q2 results, leaving investors with uncertainties.
data.description: After releasing its fiscal Q2 results, Oracle faced a decline in stock value on Wednesday. The tech giant, seen as influential in the AI discussion, reported a mix of positive and negative figures, prompting concerns from investors. The stock experienced a significant dive following the announcement, reflecting uncertainties within the market. This development has raised further questions about Oracle's performance moving forward.

data.title: Grand Slam Track initiates reorganization in LA, strengthening financial foundation for future growth and investment.
data.description: Grand Slam Track™ ("GST") has announced a court-supervised reorganization on December 11, 2025, in Los Angeles. This move aims to bolster the company's financial base for future growth and investment opportunities in the global professional track competition arena. The reorganization plan involves a comprehensive strategy to navigate the challenges and facilitate potential growth.

data.title: JM Group Limited closed their $15 million IPO with 3,750,000 ordinary shares offered at $4 per share.
data.description: On December 11, 2025, JM Group Limited, a company based in Hong Kong specializing in sourcing and wholesale solutions for various consumer products, completed its initial public offering (IPO). The offering consisted of 3,750,000 ordinary shares sold at a public price of $4 per share. The total gross earnings from the offering amounted to $15,000,000, excluding costs related to underwriting discounts and other expenses.

data.title: Enerflex Ltd. redeemed 9% Senior Notes due 2027 with $400 million from 6.875% senior notes due 2031.
data.description: In Calgary, Alberta on December 11, 2025, Enerflex Ltd. (TSX: EFX) (NYSE: EFXT) completed the redemption of all its 9.00% Senior Secured Notes due 2027 using proceeds from Enerflex Inc.'s private offering of $400 million in aggregate principal amount of 6.875% senior notes due 2031 (the “2031 Notes”) and availability under the Company’s secured revolving credit facility. The 2031 Notes were issued at par and guaranteed on a senior unsecured basis by the Company.

data.title: Dow gains over 200 points, reaching 48,273.18. Oracle shares fall by 15% post Q2 results. Material shares rise by 1.2%.
data.description: Stocks in the U.S. showed mixed trading today, with the Dow Jones index increasing by over 200 points on Thursday. At the market opening, the Dow rose by 0.45% to 48,273.18 points, while the NASDAQ saw a decline of 0.70% to 23,488.33 points. The S&P 500 also dropped by 0.35% to 6,862.54 points. Notably, materials sector shares surged by 1.2% today, whereas information technology stocks fell by 1.4%. In significant news, Oracle Corp. (NYSE: ORCL) experienced a 15% decrease in its shares after revealing a mixed second-quarter financial report for fiscal 2026. Despite reporting revenue of $16.06 billion, which was below analyst estimates of $16.21 billion, the software company witnessed a 54% year-over-year growth in adjusted earnings to $2.26 per share, surpassing analyst predictions of $1.64 per share. For more detailed information regarding this news, the full story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Lolli partners with Spark to enhance Bitcoin rewards, with expanded integrations. Acquisition by Thesis earlier this year.
data.description: A Bitcoin rewards platform, Lolli, has recently incorporated Spark's infrastructure, with intentions to further expand integrations. The announcement was made by Lolli, which was acquired by Bitcoin venture studio Thesis earlier this year. The partnership between Lolli and Spark, revealed in New York on December 11, 2025, signifies a strategic move towards enhancing services and capabilities. This collaboration is a significant step for both entities as they aim to leverage each other's strengths in the industry. The integration is expected to bring about new opportunities and advancements for users.
